ui.aboutHtml:
Easy Gym — Plan, Go, Log

A free, ad-free training tracker for serious training. Build your PLAN, start your workout in GO, and keep every result in LOG — all on your phone.

Preface

I created Easy Gym for my own training. It is free and has no ads. Like it? Support me with a donation. Want your own app? Write to: arthur.stivenson@gmail.com.

PLAN

Create a plan for any date. Use + EXERCISE to add exercises with kg, reps, and sets. Use DEL to remove exercises. Save the plan when it is ready.

GO

Start from a saved PLAN. You can adjust kg, reps, and sets during the workout or add another + EXERCISE. Your original PLAN stays unchanged for next time.

LOG

Compare planned targets with actual results. Completed sets are marked green. Save or share your final training log.

MGMT & share

Share Plan as Link — Plan-Link will be available in Easy Gym from App Store.

Share Plan File or LOG — When you share a file, we create a secure link you can send via WhatsApp or other messengers.

Save File or LOG — saves it locally.

Insert Plan File — imports a received plan file into Easy Gym.

Backup

Backup saves a full copy. Restore recovers your data. Delete Data wipes everything after confirmation.

Privacy

Easy Gym works on your phone. Your plans and logs stay on your device unless you share them.
